# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "metadata": {
    "description": "Cannot create Azure AD service principals or grant subscription-wide Contributor via ARM template. Use a managed identity with least-privilege role assignments, or provision identity/role assignments outside ARM."
  },
  "parameters": {
    "managedIdentityName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the user-assigned managed identity for CI/CD."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "targetResourceGroupName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Resource group scope for least-privilege Contributor assignment."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "managedIdentityResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]",
    "targetRgScope": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups', parameters('targetResourceGroupName'))]",
    "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]",
    "roleAssignmentGuid": "[guid(variables('targetRgScope'), variables('managedIdentityResourceId'), 'Contributor')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-31",
      "name": "[parameters('managedIdentityName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentGuid')]",
      "scope": "[variables('targetRgScope')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName')), '2023-01-31', 'Full').principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "managedIdentityResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('managedIdentityResourceId')]"
    },
    "managedIdentityPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName')), '2023-01-31', 'Full').principalId]"
    }
  }
}
